name: Green Peas & Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Green peas, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring water to a boil.
2. Add peas and cook for 5 minutes or until just tender. Drain the peas.
3. Meanwhile, heat oil in a non-stick skillet.
4. Saute mushrooms and green onions until tender.
5. Combine with peas and toss with soy sauce.
